name: pattern extractor frontmatter satisfies the cross-cutting subagent contract (name, model, description, prompt_id, prompt_version)
command: head -40 "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/pr-pattern-extractor.md" 2>err.txt > head.txt && grep -q '^name:' head.txt && grep -q '^model:' head.txt && grep -q '^description:' head.txt && grep -q '^prompt_id:' head.txt && grep -q '^prompt_version:' head.txt && echo ok 1>&2
